title: tetranema megaphyllum
intro: Tetranema megaphyllum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the large-leaved bee blossom. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico and Central America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tetranema megaphyllum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically harvested and dried to make teas or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
